headline: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From Jabil’s Q2 Earnings Call
summary: Jabil delivered a quarter that met Wall Street’s expectations, with management attributing broad-based revenue growth to robust performance across its key segments. CEO Mike Dastoor emphasized that demand for AI infrastructure remained especially strong, with Automotive & Transportation and Digital Commerce also outperforming initial assumptions. The company’s diversified approach was cited as central to weathering varying market cycles, while Intelligent Infrastructure growth was fueled by capi
